title: Stock market news for June 15, 2026: Dow climbs more than 450 points for record close
summary: All three major U.S. indexes closed sharply higher Monday, driven by a U.S.-Iran peace agreement, reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, and continued strength in SpaceX shares. Dow +468.77 pts (+0.92%) to 51,671.03 (record). S&P 500 +1.65% to 7,554.29. Nasdaq +3.07% to 26,683.94 — best day since March 31.

title: Stock Market Today (June 15, 2026): Nasdaq, S&P 500 jumps after U.S. and Iran announce peace deal
summary: Stocks soared and oil prices tumbled after President Trump announced a deal to end U.S.–Iran hostilities and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Holiday-shortened week started with broad-based gains led by technology and discretionary sectors.

title: Markets News, June 15, 2026: Stocks Surge, Oil Prices Tumble on U.S.-Iran Deal; SpaceX Stock Soars in Day 2 of Trading
summary: Stocks soar, oil tumbles on U.S.-Iran peace deal. WTI crude down 5%, Brent down 5%. Nasdaq +3.0%, S&P 500 +1.9%, Dow +1.4%. SOX Semiconductor Index +5% to record. SpaceX market cap above $2.1T. Fox-Roku $22B merger. Fed meeting starts Tuesday.

title: Stock market today: Dow hits record, S&P 500, Nasdaq soar as tech rallies amid US-Iran pact to reopen Hormuz
summary: Nasdaq Composite +3.07%, S&P 500 +1.65%, Dow +0.92% to fresh record. SpaceX +19.60%. Brent crude -4.7% to ~$83/bbl. WTI -5%+ but held above $80. CME FedWatch shows 98% probability Fed leaves rates unchanged Wednesday. Juneteenth holiday Friday — markets closed.

title: Stock Market Live June 15, 2026: S&P 500 (SPY) Rocketing on End-of-War News
summary: S&P 500 up 1.73% to 7,564.10 intraday, Nasdaq-100 +2.93%, Russell +0.71%. Oil -$4.64 to $80.20. Goldman Sachs reiterates Buy on NVDA with CY27 estimates 30% above Street. DraftKings bullish on World Cup 2026 as customer acquisition driver.

title: SpaceX stock gains 10% as it begins first full day of trading after record IPO
summary: SpaceX (SPCX) rose ~10-20% on first full trading day after record IPO. Priced at $135, Friday close ~$161, Monday intraday ~$183.40. Market cap above $2T. Musk targets $1T revenue by 2030. CFRA initiated Sell at $115 target; NewStreet set $165 target. Governance concerns flagged.

title: Fox strikes $22 billion deal for Roku to fuel streaming push
summary: Fox Corp to acquire Roku in cash-and-stock deal valued at ~$22B EV. $160/share ($96 cash + ~0.97 Fox Class A shares). 33.7% premium to pre-rumor close. Post-close ownership: Fox 73%, Roku 27%. Expected close 1H2027. ~$400M annual run-rate synergies. Fox shares fell ~17% on dilution fears; Roku traded 12% below offer price. TD Cowen skeptical: 'history of content/platform mergers in media has generally not been kind.'

title: Oil prices fall on US, Iran deal announcement
summary: Crude oil prices fell over 4% to three-month lows after US and Iran agreed to ceasefire extension. Brent down 3.6% to $84.21, WTI down over 4% to $81.38. Strait of Hormuz handles ~20% of global oil trade. Full reopening will take months. US avg gasoline price: $4.07/gal (AAA), down from May peak of $4.56 but still >$1 above pre-war levels.

title: US-Iran deal finalizes: Will Oil prices return to pre-war levels below $70?
summary: WTI crude slid over 4% to near $79.50 in European trading Monday. Trump authorized immediate removal of naval blockade. Formal signing June 19 in Switzerland. ANZ analyst: oil may break $80 on relief but infrastructure damage means prices stay elevated. Technical: bearish below 20-day EMA at $89.44, RSI 34.84, support at $78.88 then $75.95. EUR/USD around 1.1600, GBP/USD above 1.3400, Gold above $4,300.

title: June Fed Meeting: Live Updates and Commentary
summary: Fed meeting Tuesday June 16. Rate cuts 'off the table'; chatter about potential rate hike but considered unlikely. New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh's first post-meeting press conference. Market pricing 98% probability of no change via CME FedWatch.
